remaining_scope.reason: The paper-reported estimate is 4.51e18 head-contraction operations and 149 days on one A100; this exceeds the current no-force compute policy.

remaining_scope.scope: Exact Table III amplitudes and bitstring probabilities
remaining_scope.reason: The public case does not include a runnable bundle of the original 53-qubit circuits, contraction path, slicing configuration, and validation amplitudes; recomputation also depends on the full contraction.

difference_reasons_for_figures.fig2_fig5_fig6: The generated data use an 18-qubit random-circuit feature check rather than the paper's 53-qubit Sycamore contraction.
difference_reasons_for_figures.table2: The table figure visualizes paper-reported complexity estimates; it is not a measured rerun of the 53-qubit contraction.
